body.description: Note text content. The handler maps this to hs_note_body.

timestamp.description: Timestamp for hs_timestamp. Prefer Unix timestamp in milliseconds. If omitted, current time is used.

hubspot_owner_id.description: Optional owner ID to attribute the note to.

associateWith.description: CRM records to associate this note with.

properties.description: Advanced: raw HubSpot note properties to set/override (propertyName -> value).
